description: Rise of Avalon Patch 1 Hotfix 1 (20 August 2020) — Corrupted Dungeon invader Infamy reset fix.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed an issue where the invader's Infamy could be reset in certain circumstances when invading someone else's Corrupted Dungeon
sections.searchable_text: Fixes invader Infamy reset Corrupted Dungeon
